data.name: 核价标准模板-Excel基础结构 v5.0
data.description: V142 创建。基于核价系统 5.0 版 Excel 全部 25 个 sheet 中 20 个料号级 sheet, 每 sheet 配置 1 个组件 tab, 数据从核价物理表 (costing_part_*, mat_fee, mat_customer_part_mapping) 通过 v_c_*_merged 视图按 hf_part_no 自动注入。4 个全局参考 sheet (元素核价/材料核价/汇率/版本) 不做料号 tab, 1 个汇总 sheet 由公式生成。
data.usageNote: 核价员/销售在每个 tab 查看对应料号的核价数据 (只读); 总公式与基础数据维护见 V98 完整公式版模板。

"v_costing_summary_full.incoming_process_fee"}, {"title": "来料其他比例费用", "hidden": true, "col_key": "B_OTHER", "visible": false, "col_name": "来料其他比例费用", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.incoming_other_fee"}, {"title": "来料其他固定费用", "hidden": true, "col_key": "B_FIX", "visible": false, "col_name": "来料其他固定费用", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_c_summary_agg.incoming_fixed_fee"}, {"title": "回收成本", "hidden": true, "col_key": "B_RECYCLE", "visible": false, "col_name": "回收成本", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.recycle_cost"}, {"title": "材料损耗成本源", "hidden": true, "col_key": "C_LOSS", "visible": false, "col_name": "材料损耗成本源", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.material_loss_cost"}, {"title": "包装材料费源", "hidden": true, "col_key": "D_PKG", "visible": false, "col_name": "包装材料费源", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_c_summary_agg.packaging_fee"}, {"title": "加工费源", "hidden": true, "col_key": "E_PROC", "visible": false, "col_name": "加工费源", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.process_fee_total"}, {"title": "电镀加工费", "hidden": true, "col_key": "L_EPROC", "visible": false, "col_name": "电镀加工费", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.plating_process_fee"}, {"title": "电镀材料费", "hidden": true, "col_key": "L_EMAT", "visible": false, "col_name": "电镀材料费", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.plating_material_fee"}, {"title": "电镀不良率", "hidden": true, "col_key": "L_EDEF", "visible": false, "col_name": "电镀不良率", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.plating_defect_rate"}, {"title": "外加工成本源", "hidden": true, "col_key": "M_OUT", "visible": false, "col_name": "外加工成本源", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_c_summary_agg.outsource_fee"}, {"title": "管理费比例", "hidden": true, "col_key": "F_MGMT", "visible": false, "col_name": "管理费比例", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.mgmt_fee_ratio"}, {"title": "财务费比例", "hidden": true, "col_key": "G_FIN", "visible": false, "col_name": "财务费比例", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.finance_fee_ratio"}, {"title": "利润比例", "hidden": true, "col_key": "H_PROFIT", "visible": false, "col_name": "利润比例", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.profit_ratio"}, {"title": "税费比例", "hidden": true, "col_key": "I_TAX", "visible": false, "col_name": "税费比例", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.tax_ratio"}, {"title": "单重(g/pcs)", "hidden": true, "col_key": "Q_WT", "visible": false, "col_name": "单重(g/pcs)", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.unit_weight_g"}, {"title": "核价汇率(CNY到USD)", "hidden": true, "col_key": "Q_RATE", "visible": false, "col_name": "核价汇率(CNY到USD)", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_costing_summary_full.exchange_rate_to_usd"}, {"title": "宏丰料号", "hidden": false, "col_key": "A", "visible": true, "col_name": "宏丰料号", "col_index": "A", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "{hf_part_no}"}, {"title": "材料成本", "hidden": false, "col_key": "B", "formula": "=[B_PURE]+[B_PROC]+[B_OTHER]+[B_FIX]-[B_RECYCLE]", "visible": true, "col_name": "材料成本", "col_index": "B", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "MATERIAL_COST"}, {"title": "材料损耗成本", "hidden": false, "col_key": "C", "formula": "=[C_LOSS]", "visible": true, "col_name": "材料损耗成本", "col_index": "C", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "MATERIAL_LOSS"}, {"title": "包装材料费", "hidden": false, "col_key": "D", "formula": "=[D_PKG]", "visible": true, "col_name": "包装材料费", "col_index": "D", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "PACKAGING_FEE"}, {"title": "加工费", "hidden": false, "col_key": "E", "formula": "=[E_PROC]", "visible": true, "col_name": "加工费", "col_index": "E", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "PROCESS_FEE"}, {"title": "电镀成本", "hidden": false, "col_key": "L", "formula": "=([L_EPROC]+[L_EMAT])*(1+[L_EDEF])", "visible": true, "col_name": "电镀成本", "col_index": "L", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "PLATING_COST"}, {"title": "其他外加工成本", "hidden": false, "col_key": "M", "formula": "=[M_OUT]", "visible": true, "col_name": "其他外加工成本", "col_index": "M", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "OUTSOURCE_COST"}, {"title": "加价基数", "hidden": true, "col_key": "BASE", "formula": "=[B]+[C]+[D]+[E]+[L]+[M]", "visible": false, "col_name": "加价基数", "source_type": "FORMULA"}, {"title": "管理费", "hidden": false, "col_key": "F", "formula": "=[BASE]*[F_MGMT]", "visible": true, "col_name": "管理费", "col_index": "F", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "MGMT_FEE"}, {"title": "财务费", "hidden": false, "col_key": "G", "formula": "=[BASE]*[G_FIN]", "visible": true, "col_name": "财务费", "col_index": "G", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "FINANCE_FEE"}, {"title": "利润", "hidden": false, "col_key": "H", "formula": "=[BASE]*[H_PROFIT]", "visible": true, "col_name": "利润", "col_index": "H", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "PROFIT"}, {"title": "税费", "hidden": false, "col_key": "I", "formula": "=[BASE]*[I_TAX]", "visible": true, "col_name": "税费", "col_index": "I", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "TAX"}, {"title": "运费", "hidden": false, "col_key": "J", "visible": true, "col_name": "运费", "col_index": "J", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_c_summary_agg.freight_fee", "comparison_tag": "FREIGHT_FEE"}, {"title": "清关费", "hidden": false, "col_key": "K", "visible": true, "col_name": "清关费", "col_index": "K", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_c_summary_agg.customs_fee", "comparison_tag": "CUSTOMS_FEE"}, {"title": "总成本(CNY/KG)", "hidden": false, "col_key": "N", "formula": "=[B]+[C]+[D]+[E]+[F]+[G]+[H]+[I]+[J]+[K]+[L]+[M]", "visible": true, "col_name": "总成本(CNY/KG)", "col_index": "N", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "TOTAL_CNY_KG"}, {"title": "币种", "hidden": false, "col_key": "O", "visible": true, "col_name": "币种", "col_index": "O", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_c_summary_agg.currency_label"}, {"title": "计量单位", "hidden": false, "col_key": "P", "visible": true, "col_name": "计量单位", "col_index": "P", "source_type": "VARIABLE", "variable_path": "v_c_summary_agg.weight_unit_label"}, {"title": "总成本(USD/PCS)", "hidden": false, "col_key": "Q", "formula": "=[N]/1000*[Q_WT]*[Q_RATE]", "visible": true, "col_name": "总成本(USD/PCS)", "col_index": "Q", "source_type": "FORMULA", "comparison_tag": "TOTAL_USD_PCS"}]
